---
name: brainstorm
description: Start a brainstorming session to design a feature before implementation
agent: agent
---

Use the brainstorming skill to explore and design this idea before any implementation.

Start by exploring the project context, then ask clarifying questions one at a time. Propose 2-3 approaches with trade-offs, present the design for approval, and write a design doc.

Do NOT write any code until the design is approved.
